title: Manage the collection, monitoring and interpretation of animal health data
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage the collection, monitoring and interpretation of animal health data demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify the relevant animal diseases for data collection

pcs.text: Identify endemic diseases and conditions to be recorded relevant to the workplace and species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify endemic diseases and conditions to be recorded relevant to the workplace and species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify endemic diseases and conditions to be recorded relevant to the workplace and species.

pcs.text: Identify the standard to be applied to the recording of diseases and conditions at ante- and/or post-mortem
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the standard to be applied to the recording of diseases and conditions at ante- and/or post-mortem?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the standard to be applied to the recording of diseases and conditions at ante- and/or post-mortem.

pcs.text: Identify the impact of the relevant diseases and conditions on yield and potential impact on carcase weights
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the impact of the relevant diseases and conditions on yield and potential impact on carcase weights?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the impact of the relevant diseases and conditions on yield and potential impact on carcase weights.

pcs.text: Identify sources of information, including veterinary advice, available to producers on strategies to reduce the incidence of diseases and conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify sources of information, including veterinary advice, available to producers on strategies to reduce the incidence of diseases and conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify sources of information, including veterinary advice, available to producers on strategies to reduce the incidence of diseases and conditions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify the relevant animal diseases for data collection

elements.title: Manage the collection and recording of animal health data

pcs.text: Identify the animal diseases and conditions to be monitored at a specific premises
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the animal diseases and conditions to be monitored at a specific premises?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the animal diseases and conditions to be monitored at a specific premises.

pcs.text: Maintain and validate ante- and post-mortem data collection and recording procedures for the premises

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain and validate ante- and post-mortem data collection and recording procedures for the premises.

pcs.text: Oversee and verify the collection and recording of animal health data according to premises requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Oversee and verify the collection and recording of animal health data according to premises requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Oversee and verify the collection and recording of animal health data according to premises requirements.

pcs.text: Establish and implement the procedures for verifying the accuracy of the data collected
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish and implement the procedures for verifying the accuracy of the data collected?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish and implement the procedures for verifying the accuracy of the data collected.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Manage the collection and recording of animal health data

elements.title: Monitor and analyse animal health data

pcs.text: Establish the purpose of monitoring animal health data at a premises and national level

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish the purpose of monitoring animal health data at a premises and national level.

pcs.text: Monitor the animal health data relevant to the premises and individual producers with a view to improving the quality of incoming animals

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor the animal health data relevant to the premises and individual producers with a view to improving the quality of incoming animals.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor the animal health data against individual Property Identification Codes, local government areas and methods of animal purchase, with a view to improving the quality of incoming animals and informing animal purchasing strategies?

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate anomalies in data to establish the cause, and consult with relevant parties.

pcs.text: Establish the relevant parameters for assessing animal health data, including premises and supplier averages
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish the relevant parameters for assessing animal health data, including premises and supplier averages?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish the relevant parameters for assessing animal health data, including premises and supplier averages.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate the impact of individual diseases and conditions on the processor.
